summary: West section field survey - Glacier NP
description: Personal monitoring walk west ridge connector and upper bench. Camera + notebook. Quick impressions on return: Segment A - minor wear no big deal. Segment B - hard to say in the field need to check the photo. Segment C - appears stable some surface wear at most nothing that looked like it needed action. All three segments walked. Logged photos on return.
